programme.title: Innerspace
programme.desc: A test pilot is miniaturized in a secret experiment and accidentally injected into a hapless store clerk

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A woman agrees to be an alien test subject only to lose her mind with loneliness

programme.title: Monsters
programme.desc: A salesman comes between a husband and wife having a spat in the hotel room next door

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Cities At War - Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin - The Doomed City Berlin was under air attack throughout the war - from the British and the Americans and then the Russians

programme.title: Whos Sorry Now
programme.desc: During the Second World War the British commander of Singapore believed it to be an impregnable fortress until a numerically inferior Japanese Army overran it Similarly 12 years on the French lost the mountain garrison at Dien Bien Phu after failing to anticipate the resourcefulness of General Giap and his Vietmanese peasant army

programme.title: The USS Enterprise and the Battle of Midway
programme.desc: After expanding the war in the Pacific to include western outposts the Japanese Empire had attained its initial strategic goals quickly taking British Hong Kong the Philippines British Malaya Singapore and the Dutch East Indies modern Indonesia The Dutch East Indies with its vital oil resources was particularly important to Japan Because of this preliminary planning for the second phase of operations commenced as early as January 1942

programme.title: The Falklands War
programme.desc: This landmark documentary was produced 5 years after the end of The Falklands War and features interviews and insights from both the Argentinian and British sides

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Battlefield Vietnam 1
programme.desc: Part 1 Dien Bien Phu - The Legacy

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A high school track star haunted by the recent death of her Olympic-medalist mother is given her mothers magic crystal amulet which brings to life her secret ambitions and extracts vengeance upon those who cause her pain

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A housewife stressed out by her husbands reckless behavior welcomes an elderly cosmetics saleswoman in to her home Only to discover that the old hag has another more devious motive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: A rancher comes after Eric when he befriends a she-wolf who earlier had attacked the rancher for killing her wolf pups

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: While working as a grounds keeper on a large estate owned by a kindly old lady she is brutally murdered in her own home Both her granddaughter and granddaughters husband implicate Eric But Eric knows he didnt do it and knows who did

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: The death of a model recalls for Nick his own infatuation with a beautiful ballerina one hundred years ago

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: The Hills have Eyes
programme.desc: On the way to California a family has the misfortune to have their car break down in an area closed to the public and inhabited by violent savages ready to attack

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer and his fellow Marines are headed into town on day passes when one of them is stuck on guard duty Gomer volunteers to help his buddys wife take care of things for the baby - but Sgt Carter volunteers to drive them around leaving his date on hold

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While hitching a ride to town Gomer stops to help a stranded motorist she takes him into town to meet her mother A robber is holding up liquor stores while wearing a Marines uniform at the same time

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan rescues a native woman from drowning which according her custom makes her his slave But soon a fellow tribesman comes to the island and challenges Gilligan for her in a fight to the death

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A missing military jet pack washes up on the island and The Professor tries to figure out a way to use it for their rescue

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Kate is expecting some women from the Garden Club to visit and is nervous about them asking her to join Of course Grampa makes the wrong impression and Kate is sure that she will not get the invite

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: A new female neighbor makes a bad impression on Grampa by being better than him at almost everything

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL sends 86 and 99 into a circus to look for a smuggling operation

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: The CONTROL agents are trapped on a KAOS island

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ runs afoul of Clearwaters power broker Jason T Rockman when he agrees to take Dr Winters and a group of her mental patients to a local carnival

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Its Rogers birthday and hes angry with Mister Ed for eating apples from his trees

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilber enters into a televised debate against a respected member of the community who wants to ban horses from the neighborhood

programme.title: Hogans 324
programme.desc: Hogans 324

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Herman doesnt want his old mentor to know he know works at a supermarket; Wood helps out in son Wills class

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood hopes Florida State coach Bobby Bowden will offer Taylor a football scholarship

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Vega

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: A diamond theft on a cruise ship owned by Jonathan leads the Harts to join the cruise ship to catch the thief

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: George is dismayed when an old flame returns after thirty-one years and has changed completely

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Dick and Joanna feel left out when some old friends visit the Inn but spend no time with them

programme.title: Major Dad
programme.desc: Major Dad

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find two crates of silent film equipment in a sunken boat in the lagoon The Professor then comes up with the idea to make a film telling their story send it out on a raft and hope for rescue

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: A deranged man named Garth Youngblood takes a fancy to Baywatch lifeguard Caroline Holden and makes many advances toward her When Caroline resists Garth captures her and locks her in a cage furnished like her apartment while Mitch teams with fellow Baywatch lifeguards Newman and Barnett to help him and Garner look for Caroline

programme.title: OPReEpisode804SD
programme.desc: OPReEpisode804SD

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Missing in Action 2
programme.desc: Prequel to the first Missing In Action set in the early 1980s it shows the capture of Colonel Braddock during the Vietnam war in the 1970s and his captivity with other American POWs in a brutal prison camp and his plans to escape

programme.title: The Wizard of Speed and Time
programme.desc: A Hollywood filmmaker Mike Jittlov makes a short for an evil film studio Unbeknownest to him the producer has placed a bet of 25000 that he wont come up with anything with a use Luckily our film creator gets the help of his friends

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 221
programme.desc: Hercules 221

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Artifacts believed to be Taelon are found in South America Renee and Liam try to beat Sandoval to the source to determine the importance of the found pieces

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians attempt to take over a military base that has been used as a secure storage area for much of the information regarding the 1953 invasion In particular they are seeking the location of Martians who are still in hibernation waiting to rejoin the invasion

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: An Eagle is sent onto the surface of the planet Psychon which has titanium needed for repairs to the Alpha Base It fails to return and is used by Psychon scientist Mentor as bait with which to entice other members of the Alphan crew onto the planet Mentor is building a biological computer that will hopefully transform his deteriorating planet back into the Eden it once was However the machine can only be fueled by the living brains of humans and Mentor has his eye on those of the Alphan crew Fortunately Mentor is not alone on the planet; his innocent daughter the shape-shifting Maya is unaware of her fathers plans so Koenig tries to convince her to side with the Alphans

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: In Mexico Cheyenne finds a wounded man he takes to a local village which has a female doctor He quickly learns the town is being held hostage by a vicious bandit who will burn the village if he doesnt find who shot two of his men

programme.title: Young 304
programme.desc: Young 304

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Alcoholic Off Joe Landers accidentally gets his partner killed and clumsily tries to cover it up as Stone and Keller work their way to the truth

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: An elderly cardinal has been taken prisoner in a fictional Eastern European country because the clergyman is the leader of the political opposition The IMF force is tasked with freeing him from the inescapable prison

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Playing a kind of Prof Higgins to his Eliza Doolittle Kimble schools an uneducated woman while her boyfriend works his next big score An undercover policeman originally shadowing the gangster-boyfriend takes an interest in Kimble

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: Everyone except Heath who has met the stranger and knows some of his exploits firsthand extends a warm welcome to the aging cowboy who killed the murderer of patriarch Tom Barkley during the Barkley-Railroad War The man as it turns out is a friend to no one Hes a sociopath and mercenary who enjoys range wars and will sell his sanguinary services to either side And hes looking for work

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyennes partner leaves on private business When he doesnt return Cheyenne follows him to determine what happened Cheyenne finds him in jail where he is shot Cheyenne finds himself in a mess related to an estate and lawyer

programme.desc: Thunderbolt a veteran bank robber teams up with Lightfoot a young thief who saves him from a tough situation for a new and daring heist with his old gang

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: After retiring from his wrestling career Sean Quinn still wanted to compete. He viewed his discovery of Brazilian Jiu Jitsu as a natural progression to MMA. As Sean takes us through his day, we see life from the perspective of somebody who doesn't like to rely on others. Inspired by his own childhood in which he did not have access to a gym and coaching, he has turned that around, becoming a coach and owning his own gym.

programme.desc: Iman Barlow v. Ashley Nichols

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: See Ball Get Ball
programme.desc: Hosted by David Pollack, a College Football Hall of Famer, three-time First-Team All-American from the University of Georgia, and first-round NFL Draft pick, this podcast provides honest analysis of the most significant stories, matchups, and moments in the world of college football.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: The Chef Felicia Grady Cooking Special
programme.desc: World renown chef Ms Felicia Grady stops by the show to cook a delicious meal for the crew

programme.title: The Heart Hayes Interview
programme.desc: Join me as I sit down with the beautiful actress Heart Hayes Hear how keeping her standards high is the only option Also in the episode I chat it up with former Supreme Susaye Green And Businessman Mr Johnboy Watts

programme.title: The Sherard Show on location at the Comedy Chateau
programme.desc: Join me live on location where I chop it up with comedy icon Mr Mike Marino As well as surprise guest Mr Sean Kanan and more!

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Mel Carter Interview
programme.desc: The last of the great ones Mr Mel Carter returns to the show to speak about Sam Cooke Dean Martin and one person youll never believe he worked with

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The Florence La Rue Interview
programme.desc: I never really thought I could sing Hear in her own words how singing was the furtherest thing from her mind

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The GoBots are forced into a grudging alliance to defeat a race of enormous metal-eating spiders

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Warlike insects invade the Earth thanks to Cy-Kills space rift but his plan backfires when the bugs prove too difficult to eradicate even for the Renegades

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: While teaching the cat people of a planet war strategy Oon wanders from lecture to lecture feeling unneeded and worthless Gillian discovers the planet houses a Nightwalker which is kept behind enormous tall doors and sealed with a gold symbol

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Unknown to Herc he falls into a trap set by Saw Boss when he wins a bet and the map to Dream World Helicia keeper of Dream World must accept them or face destruction from Saw Boss Everything goes beautifully

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: VENOM is manipulating a tribe of aboriginals with holographic projections of flying rocks The aboriginals think its their god Mimi VENOM is after the secret treasure chamber of Mimi Scott and T-Bob get mixed up with the aboriginals when they think T-Bob is representing their Mimi god At the end Brad saves the day with his hocus pocus mask

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Researchers in Africa discover a Golden Scarab which they believe to be part of a hidden treasure that belonged to a lost tribe of Egypt Of course VENOM is after the treasure themselves Sly Rax accidentally triggers an ancient device in an underground lake that creates an opening in the walls of Solomons Gorge and reveals the treasure MASK must stop VENOM from escaping with the treasure

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: While the N team tries to get Simons memory back Mother Brain gets King Hippo and Eggplant Wizard to brainwash him into thinking hes an N-Team hunter Later Simon believes he is Donkey Kong Jr

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Lana Simon and Duke go to the Mirror World to rescue the princess father King Charles In the mean time their opposites are on a journey to their world

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
